violations.text: Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
The lights under the kitchen hood were nonfunctional during time of inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
The kitchen hood vents have an accumulation of soil residue. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026

The door to the outside, located in the back of the kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Establishment is to clean hood. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2024

Raw animal foods eggs were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods French fries in the 3 door reach in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/09/2024
